entities.name: cOrder

fields.name: organization
fields.label: Organization
fields.help: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

fields.name: transactionDocument
fields.label: Transaction Document
fields.help: Specifies document subtype (eg. POS Order, Return Material, etc.) that each document (such as Sales Invoice, Purchase Order, etc.). Various document subtypes usually differ on the consequences they have. You can convert document types (e.g. from Offer to Order).  The conversion is then reflected in the current type.

validationRule.code:
C_DocType.DocBaseType IN ('SOO', 'POO') AND C_DocType.IsSOTrx='@IsSOTrx@'
AND (AD_ISORGINCLUDED(@AD_Org_ID@,C_DocType.AD_Org_ID, @#AD_Client_ID@) <> '-1' OR COALESCE(@AD_Org_ID@,'-1')='-1')
AND COALESCE(@isReturnMaterial@, 'N') = C_DocType.IsReturn
AND ((@isQuotation@='Y' AND docsubtypeso like 'OB') OR ((@isQuotation@='N' OR @isQuotation@ is null) AND (docsubtypeso is null OR docsubtypeso not like 'OB')))
(C_RETURN_REASON.ISRFC = @ISSOTRX@ OR C_RETURN_REASON.ISRTV=(case when @ISSOTRX@='N' then 'Y' else 'N' end))

fields.name: documentNo
fields.label: Document No.
fields.help: The document number is usually automatically generated by the system and determined by the document type of the document. If the document is not saved, the preliminary number is displayed in "<>". If the document type of your document has no automatic document sequence defined, the field will be empty when creating a new document. This is for documents which usually have an external number (like vendor invoice).  If you leave the field empty, the system will generate a document number for you. The document sequence used for this fallback number is defined in the "Document Sequence" window with the name "DocumentNo_<TableName>", where TableName is the actual name of the table inside the database (e.g. C_Order).

fields.name: orderDate
fields.label: Order Date
fields.help: Indicates the Date an item was ordered.

fields.name: businessPartner
fields.label: Business Partner
fields.help: A Business Partner is anyone with whom you transact.  This can include a customer, vendor, employee or any combination of these.

fields.name: partnerAddress
fields.label: Partner Address
fields.help: The Partner address indicates the location of a Business Partner

fields.name: priceList
fields.label: Price List
fields.help: Price Lists are used to determine the pricing, margin and cost of items purchased or sold.

fields.name: scheduledDeliveryDate
fields.label: Scheduled Delivery Date
fields.help: Scheduled Delivery Date indicates the date, if any, that an order was promised by.

validationRule.code:
EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM FIN_FinAcc_PaymentMethod fapm WHERE FIN_PaymentMethod.FIN_PaymentMethod_ID=fapm.FIN_PaymentMethod_ID
AND fapm.Payin_Allow = (SELECT CASE WHEN '@IsSOTrx@'='Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE fapm.Payin_Allow END FROM DUAL)
AND fapm.Payout_Allow = (SELECT CASE WHEN '@IsSOTrx@'='N' THEN 'Y' ELSE fapm.Payout_Allow END FROM DUAL))

fields.name: paymentTerms
fields.label: Payment Terms
fields.help: Payment Terms identify the method and timing of payment for this transaction.

fields.name: warehouse
fields.label: Warehouse
fields.help: The Warehouse identifies a unique Warehouse where products are stored or Services are provided.

reference.hql:
select w.id as id, w.name as name
from Warehouse w
where @additional_filters@
and w.active=true

fields.name: invoiceTerms
fields.label: Invoice Terms
fields.help: The Invoice Rule defines how a Business Partner is invoiced and the frequency of invoicing.

validationRule.code: (AD_Ref_List.value IN ('I', 'D', 'O') OR (SELECT DOCSUBTYPESO FROM C_DOCTYPE WHERE C_DOCTYPE.C_DOCTYPE_ID = @C_DOCTYPETARGET_ID@) <> 'WR')

fields.name: documentStatus
fields.label: Document Status
fields.help: The Document Status indicates the status of a document at this time.  To change the status of a document, use one of the buttons usually located at the bottom of the document window.

fields.name: grandTotalAmount
fields.label: Total Gross Amount
fields.help: The Grand Total displays the total amount including Tax and Freight in document currency

fields.name: summedLineAmount
fields.label: Total Net Amount
fields.help: The Total amount displays the total of all lines in document currency

fields.name: currency
fields.label: Currency
fields.help: Indicates the currency to be used when processing this document.

fields.name: userContact
fields.label: User/Contact
fields.help: The User identifies a unique user in the system. This could be an internal user or a business partner contact

fields.name: documentType
fields.label: Document Type
fields.help: The Document Type determines document sequence and processing rules

fields.name: reservationStatus
fields.label: Reservation Status
fields.help: Identifies if the Sales Order is completely or partially reserved

fields.name: orderReference
fields.label: Order Reference
fields.help: This can be used to input a reference for this specific transaction. For example, a Purchase Order number can be input on a Sales Order for easier reference.

fields.name: salesRepresentative
fields.label: Sales Representative
fields.help: Indicates the sales representative responsible for the transaction that  the document specifies . A valid sales representative is a business partner marked as an employee and a sales representative.

reference.filterExpression: EXISTS (SELECT * FROM C_BPartner bp WHERE AD_User.C_BPartner_ID=bp.C_BPartner_ID AND bp.IsSalesRep='Y')

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.help: A description is limited to 255 characters.

fields.name: invoiceAddress
fields.label: Invoice Address
fields.help: An indication of the address to use in the invoice.

fields.name: deliveryLocation
fields.label: Delivery Location
fields.help: Location where the product will be delivered to

fields.name: aPRMAddPayment
fields.label: Add Payment
fields.help: Launches a process to add a payment to the selected invoice.

fields.name: documentAction
fields.label: Process Order
fields.help: Process Order

fields.name: copyFrom
fields.label: Copy Lines
fields.help: Browse history of this particular document type for the selected business partner to be able to select lines (products) from these. For example, if you are creating a new sales order for business partner A, Copy Lines window will give you the history of products ordered and the prices given to business partner A within the last X days. X can be set within the business partner window. Consider this as a tiny CRM window.

fields.name: copyFromPO
fields.label: Copy from Orders
fields.help: Copy lines from orders

fields.name: deliveryMethod
fields.label: Delivery Method
fields.help: The Delivery Via indicates how the products should be delivered. For example, will the order be picked up or shipped.

fields.name: shippingCompany
fields.label: Shipping Company
fields.help: The Shipper is any entity which will provide shipping to or shipping from an Organization.

fields.name: deliveryTerms
fields.label: Delivery Terms
fields.help: The Delivery Rule indicates when an order should be delivered. For example should the order be delivered when the entire order is complete, when a line is complete or as the products become available.

fields.name: freightCostRule
fields.label: Freight Cost Rule
fields.help: The Freight Cost Rule indicates the method used when charging for freight.

fields.name: freightAmount
fields.label: Freight Amount
fields.help: The Freight Amount indicates the amount charged for Freight in the document currency.

fields.name: printDiscount
fields.label: Print Discount
fields.help: The Discount Printed Checkbox indicates if the discount will be printed on the document.

fields.name: priority
fields.label: Priority
fields.help: The Priority indicates the importance (high, medium, low) of this document

fields.name: salesCampaign
fields.label: Sales Campaign
fields.help: The Campaign defines a unique marketing program.  Projects can be associated with a pre defined Marketing Campaign.  You can then report based on a specific Campaign.

fields.name: chargeAmount
fields.label: Charge Amount
fields.help: The Charge Amount indicates the amount for an additional charge.

fields.name: charge
fields.label: Charge
fields.help: The Charge indicates a type of Charge (Handling, Shipping, Restocking)

fields.name: activity
fields.label: Activity
fields.help: Activities indicate tasks that are performed and used to utilize Activity based Costing

fields.name: trxOrganization
fields.label: Trx Organization
fields.help: The organization which performs or initiates this transaction (for another organization).  The owning Organization may not be the transaction organization in a service bureau environment, with centralized services, and inter-organization transactions.

fields.name: calculatePromotions
fields.label: Calculate Promotions
fields.help: Calculates and applies the promotions that can valid for the current document modifying final prices if any of them is applicable.

fields.name: createOrder
fields.label: Create Order
fields.help: A firm quote establishes a commitment to the customer at a quoted price for a indicated quantity. If the firm quote check box is not selected and the price list is modified after the quotation then the new prices will be reflected in the sales order or invoice

fields.name: cancelledorder
fields.label: Canceled Order
fields.help: Link to the order that has been canceled

fields.name: replacedorder
fields.label: Replaced Order
fields.help: Link to the order that has been replaced

fields.name: replacementorderID
fields.label: Replacement Order
fields.help: Link to the replacement order. This order is the order that has replaced the current Cancelled order.

fields.name: iscancelled
fields.label: Is Canceled
fields.help: The Sales Order has been canceled and canceled and replaced. A new Cancellation Sales Order has been created in Closed Status and if it is replaced also a new Sales Order in Book Status has been created replacing the original one.

fields.name: externalBusinessPartnerReference
fields.label: CRM Reference
fields.help: This field stores the business partner reference to an external CRM system. This is useful only when the business partner management is done outside Openbravo. In this case Openbravo will internally use the anonymous customer but it will track the real customer in the external system through this field.

fields.name: project
fields.label: Project
fields.help: Identifier of a project defined within the Project & Service Management module.

validationRule.code: C_Project.projectstatus in ('OP', 'OR') and (C_Project.c_bpartner_id=@C_BPartner_ID@ or '@IsSOTrx@'='N') or C_Project.c_project_id = @c_project_id@

fields.name: costcenter
fields.label: Cost Center
fields.help: Division that adds to the cost of an organization. Internal structure for cost allocation.

fields.name: asset
fields.label: Asset
fields.help: Any item of economic value owned by the corporation, especially that which could be converted to cash.

fields.name: stDimension
fields.label: 1st Dimension
fields.help: The user defined element displays the optional elements that have been defined for this account combination.

fields.name: ndDimension
fields.label: 2nd Dimension
fields.help: The user defined element displays the optional elements that have been defined for this account combination.

fields.name: cancelandreplace
fields.label: Cancel and Replace
fields.help: Button that creates a temporal duplicated order

fields.name: paymentStatus
fields.label: Payment Status
fields.help: Percent paid of the order

fields.name: confirmcancelandreplace
fields.label: Confirm Cancel and Replace
fields.help: Button that confirms the temporal Order by closing it and creates a canceled order

fields.name: priceIncludesTax
fields.label: Price includes Tax
fields.help: The Tax Included checkbox indicates if the prices include tax.  This is also known as the gross price.

fields.name: posted
fields.label: Posted
fields.help: An accounting status button that indicates if the transaction has already been posted to the general ledger or not. When doing the accounting manually this button can be used to post or unpost the transaction from the general ledger by hand.

fields.name: formOfPayment
fields.label: Form of Payment
fields.help: Form of Payment indicates the method of payment used for this transaction (eg. cash, wire transfer, etc.)

fields.name: salesTransaction
fields.label: Sales Transaction
fields.help: The Sales Transaction checkbox indicates if this item is a Sales Transaction.

fields.name: datePrinted
fields.label: Date printed
fields.help: Indicates the Date that a document was printed.

fields.name: processed
fields.label: Processed
fields.help: The Processed checkbox indicates that a document has been processed.

fields.name: incoterms
fields.label: Incoterms
fields.help: The ID identifies a unique Incoterm

fields.name: iNCOTERMSDescription
fields.label: INCOTERMS description
fields.help: Description of the incoterm

fields.name: deliveryNotes
fields.label: Delivery notes
fields.help: Notes for the delivery

fields.name: generateTemplate
fields.label: Copy Product Template
fields.help: Copy products from the business partner's template of that sales order.

fields.name: selfService
fields.label: Self-Service
fields.help: Self-Service allows users to enter data or update their data.  The flag indicates, that this record was entered or created via Self-Service or that the user can change it via the Self-Service functionality.

fields.name: dropShipLocation
fields.label: Drop Ship Location
fields.help: Business Partner Shipment Location for Drop Shipment

fields.name: dropShipPartner
fields.label: Drop Ship Partner
fields.help: Business Partner for Drop Shipment

fields.name: dropShipContact
fields.label: Drop Ship Contact
fields.help: Business Partner Contact for Drop Shipment

fields.name: processNow
fields.label: Process Order
fields.help: Process Order

fields.name: accountingDate
fields.label: Accounting Date
fields.help: The date this transaction is recorded on in the general ledger. This date also indicates which accounting period within the fiscal year this transaction will be part of.

fields.name: print
fields.label: Print
fields.help: The Printed checkbox indicates if this document or line will included when printing.

fields.name: reinvoice
fields.label: Re-invoice
fields.help: Indicator if invoiced

fields.name: active
fields.label: Active
fields.help:
There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: 
(1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes.
(2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

fields.name: client
fields.label: Client
fields.help: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

fields.name: id
fields.label: Sales Order
fields.help: Unique identifier and a reference to a Sales Order originating from the document sequence defined for this document type.

fields.name: creationDate
fields.label: Created
fields.help: The Created field indicates the date that this record was created.

fields.name: createdBy
fields.label: CreatedBy
fields.help: The Created By field indicates the user who created this record.

fields.name: fINPaymentPriorityID
fields.label: FIN_Payment_Priority_ID

derivation.source: SELECT FIN_Payment_Priority_ID FROM FIN_Payment_Priority WHERE AD_ISORGINCLUDED( (CASE WHEN @#AD_Org_ID@='0' THEN (SELECT ad_org_id FROM ad_org WHERE name = ( SELECT min(o.name) FROM ad_org o join ad_orgtype ot on (o.ad_orgtype_id=ot.ad_orgtype_id) join ad_role_orgaccess ra on (o.ad_org_id=ra.ad_org_id) join ad_role r on (ra.ad_role_id = r.ad_role_id) WHERE ot.istransactionsallowed = 'Y' and r.ad_role_id=@AD_Role_ID@)) ELSE @#AD_Org_ID@ END), AD_Org_ID, @#AD_Client_ID@) <> -1 AND Isdefault = 'Y' ORDER BY Priority

fields.defaultValue: @SQL=SELECT FIN_Payment_Priority_ID FROM FIN_Payment_Priority WHERE AD_ISORGINCLUDED( (CASE WHEN @#AD_Org_ID@='0' THEN (SELECT ad_org_id FROM ad_org WHERE name = ( SELECT min(o.name) FROM ad_org o join ad_orgtype ot on (o.ad_orgtype_id=ot.ad_orgtype_id) join ad_role_orgaccess ra on (o.ad_org_id=ra.ad_org_id) join ad_role r on (ra.ad_role_id = r.ad_role_id) WHERE ot.istransactionsallowed = 'Y' and r.ad_role_id=@AD_Role_ID@)) ELSE @#AD_Org_ID@ END), AD_Org_ID, @#AD_Client_ID@) <> -1 AND Isdefault = 'Y' ORDER BY Priority
fields.help:
Sets the priority of the payment plans generated when processing the invoice or order.
The distribution algorithm will be driven by this priority. The pending payments for order or payments will be displayed ordered by the payment priority first and then by the due date.

fields.name: cashVAT
fields.label: Iscashvat
fields.help: Cash VAT tax rate

fields.name: updated
fields.label: Updated
fields.help: The Updated field indicates the date that this record was updated.

fields.name: updatedBy
fields.label: UpdatedBy
fields.help: The Updated By field indicates the user who updated this record.

entities.hqlWhereClause: e.salesTransaction=true AND e.transactionDocument.return= false AND e.transactionDocument.sOSubType NOT LIKE 'OB'

fields.name: lineNo
fields.label: Line No.

derivation.source: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(Line),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_OrderLine WHERE C_Order_ID=@C_Order_ID@

fields.defaultValue: @SQL=SELECT COALESCE(MAX(Line),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM C_OrderLine WHERE C_Order_ID=@C_Order_ID@
fields.help: Indicates the unique line for a document.  It will also control the display order of the lines within a document.

fields.name: product
fields.label: Product
fields.help: Identifies an item which is either purchased or sold in this organization.

fields.name: operativeQuantity
fields.label: Operative Quantity
fields.help: The number of a certain item involved in the transaction, according to the defined Operative UOM.

fields.name: operativeUOM
fields.label: Alternative UOM
fields.help: The Alternative UOM defines a unique non monetary unit of measure

validationRule.code: td0.c_uom_id IN(select p.c_uom_id from m_product p where p.m_product_id = @M_Product_ID@) or td0.c_uom_id IN(select a.c_uom_id from m_product_aum a where a.m_product_id = @M_Product_ID@ and ((@IsSOTrx@ = 'Y' and a.sales <> 'NA') OR (@IsSOTrx@ <> 'Y' and a.purchase <> 'NA')))

fields.name: goodsShipmentLine
fields.label: Goods Shipment Line
fields.help: The Goods Shipment Line indicates a unique line in a Shipment document

fields.name: orderedQuantity
fields.label: Ordered Quantity
fields.help: The Ordered Quantity indicates the quantity of a product that was ordered.

fields.name: uOM
fields.label: UOM
fields.help: The UOM defines a unique non monetary unit of measure

fields.name: attributeSetValue
fields.label: Attribute Set Value
fields.help: The values of the actual Product Attributes

validationRule.code: (C_RETURN_REASON.ISRFC = @ISSOTRX@ OR C_RETURN_REASON.ISRTV=(case when @ISSOTRX@='N' then 'Y' else 'N' end))

fields.name: unitPrice
fields.label: Net Unit Price
fields.help: The actual price indicates the price for a product in source currency.

fields.name: grossUnitPrice
fields.label: Gross Unit Price
fields.help: This is the price that is provided when the price is inclusive of taxes.

fields.name: lineNetAmount
fields.label: Line Net Amount
fields.help: Indicates the line net amount based on the quantity and the actual price.  Any additional charges or freight are not included.

fields.name: lineGrossAmount
fields.label: Line Gross Amount
fields.help: This is the total amount against a line ( i.e product price * quantity + taxes )

fields.name: tax
fields.label: Tax
fields.help: The Tax indicates the type of tax for this document line.

validationRule.code: C_TAX.VALIDFROM<=COALESCE(@DateInvoiced@,@DateOrdered@) AND (C_TAX.SOPOTYPE =(CASE WHEN @IsSOTrx@ = 'Y' THEN 'S' ELSE 'P' END) OR C_TAX.SOPOTYPE = 'B') AND C_TAX.AD_CLIENT_ID=@AD_CLIENT_ID@ AND C_TAX.C_TAX_ID=(CASE WHEN @IsSOTrx@ = 'Y' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM AD_ORGINFO WHERE ISTAXUNDEDUCTABLE='Y' AND AD_ORG_ID=@AD_ORG_ID@) THEN (SELECT C_TAX_ID FROM AD_ORGINFO WHERE ISTAXUNDEDUCTABLE='Y' AND AD_ORG_ID=@AD_ORG_ID@) ELSE C_TAX.C_TAX_ID END)

fields.name: listPrice
fields.label: Net List Price
fields.help: The Net List Price is the official price stated by the selected pricelist and the currency of the document.

fields.name: grossListPrice
fields.label: Gross List Price
fields.help: The Gross List Price is the official price stated by the selected tax included pricelist and the currency of the document.

fields.name: discount
fields.label: Discount
fields.help: The Discount indicates the discount applied as a percentage of the List Price.

fields.name: warehouseRule
fields.label: Warehouse Rule
fields.help: Definition of a Warehouse Rule to be applied when getting stock from the warehouse.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.help: A description is limited to 255 characters.

fields.name: replacedorderline
fields.label: Replaced Order Line
fields.help: Link to the Order that has been replaced

fields.name: createReservation
fields.label: Stock Reservation
fields.help: Determines if a reservation must be done when the sales order is processed.

fields.name: taxableAmount
fields.label: Alternate Taxable Amount
fields.help: The Tax Base Amount indicates the base amount used for calculating the tax amount.

fields.name: invoicedQuantity
fields.label: Invoiced Quantity
fields.help: The Invoiced Quantity indicates the quantity of a product that have been invoiced.

fields.name: deliveredQuantity
fields.label: Delivered Quantity
fields.help: The Delivered Quantity indicates the quantity of a product that has already been delivered.

fields.name: orderDate
fields.label: Order Date
fields.help: Indicates the Date an item was ordered.

fields.name: scheduledDeliveryDate
fields.label: Scheduled Delivery Date
fields.help: Scheduled Delivery Date indicates the date, if any, that an order was promised by.

fields.name: warehouse
fields.label: Warehouse
fields.help: The Warehouse identifies a unique Warehouse where products are stored or Services are provided.

reference.filterExpression: M_Warehouse.AD_Client_ID=@#AD_Client_ID@ AND (select ad.isactive from ad_org ad where ad.ad_org_id = M_Warehouse.AD_Org_ID) = 'Y'

fields.name: reservedQuantity
fields.label: Reserved Quantity
fields.help: The Reserved Quantity indicates the quantity of a product that is currently reserved for this order.

fields.name: shippingCompany
fields.label: Shipping Company
fields.help: The Shipper is any entity which will provide shipping to or shipping from an Organization.

fields.name: businessPartner
fields.label: Business Partner

derivation.source: SELECT C_BPartner_ID AS DefaultValue FROM C_Order WHERE C_Order_ID=@C_Order_ID@

fields.defaultValue: @SQL=SELECT C_BPartner_ID AS DefaultValue FROM C_Order WHERE C_Order_ID=@C_Order_ID@
fields.help: A Business Partner is anyone with whom you transact.  This can include a customer, vendor, employee or any combination of these.

fields.name: directShipment
fields.label: Direct shipment
fields.help: Direct Shipment indicates if this line will ship directly from the vendor to the customer

fields.name: freightAmount
fields.label: Freight Amount
fields.help: The Freight Amount indicates the amount charged for Freight in the document currency.

fields.name: partnerAddress
fields.label: Partner Address
fields.help: The Partner address indicates the location of a Business Partner

fields.name: cancelPriceAdjustment
fields.label: Cancel Discounts and Promotions
fields.help: If the user wants not to apply promotions to a specific line, he should use this check to achieve it

fields.name: orderUOM
fields.label: Order UOM
fields.help: Alternative order UOM for the product.

fields.name: orderQuantity
fields.label: Order Quantity
fields.help: Product quantity in the order uom.

fields.name: standardPrice
fields.label: Base Net Unit Price
fields.help:
Net unit price before applying this promotion. In case multiple promotions are applied in cascade, this price is the one after applying all promotions with more priority than current one.

This field is populated in case the used price list does not include taxes.

fields.name: editLineAmount
fields.label: Edit Line Net Amount
fields.help: A flag used to allow the end-user to edit Line Net Amount field.

fields.name: reservationStatus
fields.label: Reservation Status
fields.help: Identifies if the Sales Order is completely or partially reserved

fields.name: printDescription
fields.label: Print Description
fields.help: If selected, the ticket footer printing should add the description of the Service

fields.name: overdueReturnDays
fields.label: Overdue Return Days
fields.help: Indicates if a Service is Returnable how many days has the customer to return it after buying

fields.name: organization
fields.label: Organization
fields.help: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

validationRule.code: AD_ISORGINCLUDED(ad_org.ad_org_id, CASE WHEN (@Parent_AD_Org@ IS NULL OR @Parent_AD_Org@ = '') THEN @AD_ORG_ID@ ELSE @Parent_AD_Org@ END, ad_org.ad_client_id)<>-1 AND IsReady='Y'

fields.name: project
fields.label: Project
fields.help: Identifier of a project defined within the Project & Service Management module.

fields.name: costcenter
fields.label: Cost Center
fields.help: Division that adds to the cost of an organization. Internal structure for cost allocation.

fields.name: asset
fields.label: Asset
fields.help: Any item of economic value owned by the corporation, especially that which could be converted to cash.

fields.name: stDimension
fields.label: 1st Dimension
fields.help: The user defined element displays the optional elements that have been defined for this account combination.

fields.name: ndDimension
fields.label: 2nd Dimension
fields.help: The user defined element displays the optional elements that have been defined for this account combination.

fields.name: explode
fields.label: Explode
fields.help: This process will explode the product of the selected line.

fields.name: priceLimit
fields.label: Price Limit
fields.help: The Net Price Limit indicates the lowest price for a product stated in the Price List Currency.

fields.name: currency
fields.label: Currency
fields.help: Indicates the currency to be used when processing this document.

fields.name: chargeAmount
fields.label: Charge Amount
fields.help: The Charge Amount indicates the amount for an additional charge.

fields.name: charge
fields.label: Charge
fields.help: The Charge indicates a type of Charge (Handling, Shipping, Restocking)

fields.name: invoiceDate
fields.label: Invoice Date
fields.help: The Date Invoice indicates the date printed on the invoice.

fields.name: resourceAssignment
fields.label: Resource Assignment
fields.help: The ID identifies a unique record

fields.name: sOPOReference
fields.label: SO/PO Reference
fields.help: Reference of the Sales Order Line to the corresponding Purchase Order Line or vice versa.

fields.name: dateDelivered
fields.label: Date Delivered
fields.help: Date when the product was delivered

fields.name: descriptionOnly
fields.label: Description Only
fields.help: If a line is Description Only, e.g. Product Inventory is not corrected. No accounting transactions are created and the amount or totals are not included in the document.  This for including descriptional detail lines, e.g. for an Work Order.

fields.name: priceAdjustment
fields.label: Promotion/Discount
fields.help: Promotion or Discount applied to a particular line (product) automatically by the system.

fields.name: salesOrder
fields.label: Sales Order
fields.help: Unique identifier and a reference to a Sales Order originating from the document sequence defined for this document type.

fields.name: active
fields.label: Active
fields.help:
There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: 
(1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes.
(2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

fields.name: client
fields.label: Client
fields.help: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

fields.name: id
fields.label: Sales Order Line
fields.help: A unique identifier and a reference to a sales order line (product).

fields.name: creationDate
fields.label: Created
fields.help: The Created field indicates the date that this record was created.

fields.name: createdBy
fields.label: CreatedBy
fields.help: The Created By field indicates the user who created this record.

fields.name: returnline
fields.label: Returnline
fields.help: Identifies a return order line

fields.name: updated
fields.label: Updated
fields.help: The Updated field indicates the date that this record was updated.

fields.name: active
fields.label: Active
fields.help:
There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: 
(1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes.
(2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

fields.name: documentNo
fields.label: Document No.
fields.help: The document number is usually automatically generated by the system and determined by the document type of the document. If the document is not saved, the preliminary number is displayed in "<>". If the document type of your document has no automatic document sequence defined, the field will be empty when creating a new document. This is for documents which usually have an external number (like vendor invoice).  If you leave the field empty, the system will generate a document number for you. The document sequence used for this fallback number is defined in the "Document Sequence" window with the name "DocumentNo_<TableName>", where TableName is the actual name of the table inside the database (e.g. C_Order).
